default.title: Islamic Hubb | Quran & Islamic Studies
default.description: Islamic Hubb offers Quran memorization, tajweed, Alimiyat, and deeniyat programs in Hyderabad. Empowering students with authentic Islamic education.

home.title: Islamic Hubb | Quranic Education Hub
home.description: Discover Islamic Hubb's long-term and short-term Quranic programs designed to nurture faith, knowledge, and character.

about.title: About Islamic Hubb
about.description: Learn about Islamic Hubb's mission, vision, values, and leadership team dedicated to Quranic education.

courses.title: Long-term Courses | Islamic Hubb
courses.description: Explore our 2- to 5-year Quranic and Islamic studies programs including Tajweed, Hifz, Momina, and Alimiyat.

programs.title: Short-term Courses | Islamic Hubb
programs.description: Short-term courses in Pre Alimiyat, Tasheeh & Teaching, and Asasi Deeniyat for focused skill building.

instructors.title: Leadership Team | Islamic Hubb
instructors.description: Meet the scholars and administrators guiding Islamic Hubb's Quranic and Islamic studies programs.

events.title: Events | Islamic Hubb
events.description: Join Islamic Hubb workshops, Quran gatherings, and community events in Hyderabad and online.

contact.title: Contact Islamic Hubb
contact.description: Reach Islamic Hubb in Hyderabad for admissions, course information, and community support.

faq.title: FAQ | Islamic Hubb
faq.description: Find answers about admissions, course schedules, fees, and support at Islamic Hubb.
